title: Allogene Therapeutics Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Allogene Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights. Key Clinical Catalysts 2026: ALPHA3 Lymphoma - interim results expected April 2026. Evaluates cema-cel vs observation in LBCL patients with MRD after standard therapy. Conservative expectations: 25-30% absolute MRD delta. Interim analysis: 24 patients (12 per arm). Safety assessment early. 60+ active sites US/Canada, approximately half in community practices. ALLO-329 Autoimmune - Phase 1 RESOLUTION trial reports June 2026. Dual CD19/CD70 targeting with Dagger technology to reduce lymphodepletion. Conservative 20M cell dose, tests with/without cyclophosphamide. Financial: $258.3M cash plus $23.7M escrow plus $20.7M ATM. Runway into Q1 2028. 2026 guidance: $150M operating cash, $210M GAAP expenses. Management emphasis: discipline requires prioritization on greatest allogeneic CAR-T potential programs.
